parameters.query: SELECT id, title, company, location, salary_raw, salary_min, salary_max, description, url, job_type, contract_type, work_type FROM jobs WHERE tenant_id = '{{ $('Loop Over Tenants').item.json.tenant_id }}' AND status = 'raw' AND is_duplicate = false ORDER BY discovered_at ASC LIMIT 25

INSERT INTO job_scores (tenant_id, job_id, scoring_method, title_match, seniority_match, location_match, salary_match, skills_match, sector_match, composite_score, tier, reasoning, model_used, tokens_used, cost_usd, prompt_version) VALUES ('{{ $('Loop Over Tenants').item.json.tenant_id }}', '{{ $('Rule Pre-Filter').item.json.id }}', '{{ $json.scoring_method }}', {{ $json.title_match || 0 }}, {{ $json.seniority_match || 0 }}, {{ $json.location_match || 0 }}, {{ $json.salary_match || 0 }}, {{ $json.skills_match || 0 }}, {{ $json.sector_match || 0 }}, {{ $json.composite_score }}, '{{ $json.tier }}', '{{ ($json.reasoning || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.model_used || 'rule_based' }}', {{ $json.tokens_used || 0 }}, {{ $json.cost_usd || 0 }}, 'v1');
UPDATE jobs SET status = 'scored', tier = '{{ $json.tier }}', composite_score = {{ $json.composite_score }} WHERE id = '{{ $('Rule Pre-Filter').item.json.id }}';

INSERT INTO job_scores (tenant_id, job_id, scoring_method, composite_score, tier, reasoning, model_used) VALUES ('{{ $('Loop Over Tenants').item.json.tenant_id }}', '{{ $json.id }}', 'rule_based', {{ $json.rule_score }}, '{{ $json.rule_tier }}', 'Rejected by rule-based filter', 'rule_based');
UPDATE jobs SET status = 'scored', tier = '{{ $json.rule_tier }}', composite_score = {{ $json.rule_score }} WHERE id = '{{ $json.id }}';
SELECT id AS tenant_id, name AS tenant_name, notification_email, candidate_profile, search_config, email_config FROM tenants WHERE is_active = true

SELECT id, title, company, location, salary_raw, salary_min, salary_max, description, url, job_type, contract_type, work_type FROM jobs WHERE status = 'raw' AND is_duplicate = false ORDER BY discovered_at ASC LIMIT 25

INSERT INTO job_scores (job_id, scoring_method, title_match, seniority_match, location_match, salary_match, skills_match, sector_match, composite_score, tier, reasoning, model_used, tokens_used, cost_usd, prompt_version) VALUES ('{{ $('Rule Pre-Filter').item.json.id }}', '{{ $json.scoring_method }}', {{ $json.title_match || 0 }}, {{ $json.seniority_match || 0 }}, {{ $json.location_match || 0 }}, {{ $json.salary_match || 0 }}, {{ $json.skills_match || 0 }}, {{ $json.sector_match || 0 }}, {{ $json.composite_score }}, '{{ $json.tier }}', '{{ ($json.reasoning || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.model_used || 'rule_based' }}', {{ $json.tokens_used || 0 }}, {{ $json.cost_usd || 0 }}, 'v1');
UPDATE jobs SET status = 'scored', tier = '{{ $json.tier }}', composite_score = {{ $json.composite_score }} WHERE id = '{{ $('Rule Pre-Filter').item.json.id }}';

INSERT INTO job_scores (job_id, scoring_method, composite_score, tier, reasoning, model_used) VALUES ('{{ $json.id }}', 'rule_based', {{ $json.rule_score }}, '{{ $json.rule_tier }}', 'Rejected by rule-based filter', 'rule_based');
UPDATE jobs SET status = 'scored', tier = '{{ $json.rule_tier }}', composite_score = {{ $json.rule_score }} WHERE id = '{{ $json.id }}';
